name: io.github.sergii-ziborov/weavatrix-online
description: Expanded Weavatrix MCP for Cloud and licensed Enterprise endpoints, composing the refactor layer over the MIT offline core.

packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the initial local Git repository

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_SYNC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Cloud or licensed Enterprise sync endpoint

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_SYNC_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Scoped bearer token for the selected endpoint

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_CAPABILITIES_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit endpoint capability document URL; defaults to /api/v1/capabilities on the sync origin with legacy /api/health fallback

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_PRECISION
environmentVariables.description: Core semantic precision: lsp (default) or off

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_ALLOW_TEST_RUNS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 only to authorize requested verified_change package scripts
